title: Who I Am
introduction: I am Houyi (Leo) Liu, currently completing my BBA in Accounting at Baruch College (GPA 3.7/4.0) and preparing to start the M.S. in Business Analytics program at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign in Fall 2026.

sections.title: Academic Foundation
sections.content: My training combines accounting discipline with analytics thinking. At Baruch, I have focused on advanced accounting, taxation, auditing, and accounting information systems, while building practical skills in Excel, Python, SQL, and financial data tools. This cross-training helps me move from raw data to decision-ready insight with both technical and business context.

sections.title: Internship & Project Experience
sections.content: I have worked across investment banking, equity research, and data quality operations. At J.P. Morgan Securities (China), I supported fintech M&A due diligence through company, regulatory, and financial research. At Huaxi Securities, I analyzed machinery-sector trends and built Excel-based data models for thematic reporting. At Vanho Securities, I contributed to a local government special bond deal by assisting feasibility analysis and due diligence. I also built a personal AI Cover Letter Assistant using OpenAI API, Ollama, and prompt workflows to automate drafting and PDF export.

sections.title: What I Am Building Toward
sections.content: I am focused on becoming a practitioner who can bridge finance, analytics, and applied AI. In the next stage, I want to build decision tools that are rigorous, interpretable, and useful in real workflows, especially where research quality, execution speed, and communication clarity all matter.
